name: IDF Air Campaign — Day 1 (Oct 7)
detail: IAF struck 1,000+ Gaza targets on Oct 7 night, including Hamas rocket production, command centers, and military compounds in response to the attack. Operation Swords of Iron declared.

name: Total Siege of Gaza Announced
detail: Defense Minister Gallant ordered complete siege — no electricity, water, fuel, or food to Gaza. IDF demanded evacuation of 1.1 million northern Gaza residents within 24 hours. International humanitarian law concerns raised.

name: 360,000 Reservists Called Up
detail: Largest IDF reserve mobilization since 1973 Yom Kippur War. Reservists deployed to Gaza Envelope, northern border (Hezbollah threat), and West Bank. Full mobilization completed within 72 hours.

name: IDF Ground Invasion of Northern Gaza
detail: Israeli armored and infantry forces crossed into northern Gaza on Oct 27-28. Two-pronged advance toward Gaza City and Beit Hanoun. Objective: destroy Hamas's military infrastructure and tunnel network.

name: Al-Shifa Hospital Raid
detail: IDF raided Al-Shifa Hospital on Nov 15, 2023, citing intelligence that Hamas used it as a command center. Found weapons cache, tunnel access, and surveillance equipment. Scale of Hamas use disputed.

name: Khan Yunis Ground Operation
detail: IDF 36th Division conducted extended ground operations in Khan Yunis (Jan–May 2024), targeting senior Hamas commanders including Marwan Issa (killed Mar 2024). Major tunnel network uncovered.

name: Rafah Ground Operation
detail: IDF began Rafah operation in May 2024 despite international objections. Controlled Rafah crossing, halting most humanitarian aid. Operation ultimately cleared out much of Hamas's southern Gaza presence and set conditions for Sinwar's death.

name: Yahya Sinwar Killed in IDF Operation
detail: Hamas leader and October 7 mastermind Yahya Sinwar killed by IDF forces in Rafah, Oct 16, 2024 — confirmed by DNA testing. Found carrying cash and a suitcase, apparently mid-tunnel movement.
